ir_specs.statement: Several protocol values have a fixed interpretation.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Several protocol values have a fixed interpretation.

ir_specs.statement: Namely: kernel_lo - The ::1 address that kernel installs on a loopback netdevice has this protocol value kernel_ra - IPv6 addresses installed in response to router advertisement messages kernel_ll - Link-local addresses have this protocol value The rest of the values are not reserved and the administrator is free to assign (or not to assign) protocol tags.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: Namely: kernel_lo - The ::1 address that kernel installs on a loopback netdevice has this protocol value kernel_ra - IPv6 addresses installed in response to router advertisement messages kernel_ll - Link-local addresses have this protocol value The rest of the values are not reserved and the administrator is free to assign (or not to assign) protocol tags.

ir_specs.statement: ip address delete - delete protocol address Arguments: coincide with the arguments of ip addr add.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: ip address delete - delete protocol address Arguments: coincide with the arguments of ip addr add.

ir_specs.statement: The device name is a required argument.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: The device name is a required argument.

ir_specs.statement: If no arguments are given, the first address is deleted.
ir_specs.source_quote_or_summary: If no arguments are given, the first address is deleted.
